------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Command                      Arguments                  Hotkey              Description
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Break.Clear                  Address                                        Clears a breakpoint
Break.ClearAll                                                              Clears all breakpoints
Break.ClearAllOnData                                                        Clears all data breakpoints
Break.ClearOnData            Symbol/Address                                 Clears a data breakpoint
Break.ClearOnSrc             SrcLoc                                         Clears a breakpoint on a source line
Break.ClearOnSymbol          Symbol                                         Clears a data breakpoint on a symbol
Break.Disable                Address                                        Disables a breakpoint
Break.DisableAll                                                            Disables all breakpoints on source lines
Break.DisableOnData          Symbol/Address                                 Disables a data breakpoint
Break.DisableOnSrc           SrcLoc                                         Disables a breakpoint on a source line
Break.DisableOnSymbol        Symbol                                         Disables a data breakpoint on a symbol
Break.Edit                   Parameters                                     Edits a breakpoint
Break.EditOnData             Parameters                                     Edits a data breakpoint
Break.EditOnSymbol           Parameters                                     Edits a data breakpoint on a symbol
Break.Enable                 Address                                        Enables a breakpoint
Break.EnableAll                                                             Enables all breakpoints on source lines
Break.EnableOnData           Symbol/Address                                 Enables a data breakpoint
Break.EnableOnSrc            SrcLoc                                         Enables a breakpoint on a source line
Break.EnableOnSymbol         Symbol                                         Enables a data breakpoint on a symbol
Break.Set                    Address                                        Sets a breakpoint
Break.SetCmdOnAddr           Address, Function                              Assigns a script function to a breakpoint
Break.SetCommand             Location, Function                             Assigns a script function to a breakpoint
Break.SetEx                  Address, Type                                  Sets a hardware or software breakpoint
Break.SetOnData              Symbol/Address                                 Sets a data breakpoint
Break.SetOnSrc               SrcLoc                                         Sets a breakpoint on a source line
Break.SetOnSrcEx             SrcLoc, Type                                   Sets a hardware or software breakpoint on a source line
Break.SetOnSymbol            Symbol                                         Sets a data breakpoint on a symbol
Break.SetType                Location, Type                                 Sets a breakpoint's implementation type
Break.SetVectorCatch         Index mask                                     Assigns a vector catch configuration
Coverage.Exclude             RegExp                                         Exclude item(s) from the code coverage statistic
Coverage.ExcludeNOPs                                                        Excludes all trailing NOP instructions from the code coverage statistic
Coverage.Include             RegExp                                         Include item(s) to the code coverage statistic
Debug.Connect                                                               Connects to the target
Debug.Continue                                          F5                  Resumes program execution
Debug.Disconnect                                                            Disconnects from the target
Debug.Download                                                              Downloads the program file
Debug.Halt                                              Ctrl+F5             Halts program execution
Debug.IsHalted                                                              Queries the program state
Debug.LoadSnapshot                                      Ctrl+Alt+L          Loads a debug snapshot
Debug.ReadIntoInstCache      Address, Size                                  Intitializes the instruction cache from target memory content
Debug.Reset                                             F4                  Resets the program
Debug.RunTo                  SrcLoc/Address                                 Runs the program to a source code line or instruction address
Debug.SaveSnapshot                                      Ctrl+Alt+S          Writes a debug snapshot
Debug.SetConnectMode         Mode                                           Sets the connection mode
Debug.SetNextPC              Address                                        Sets the next PC to be executed
Debug.SetNextStatement       SrcLoc                                         Sets the next source line to be executed
Debug.SetResetMode           Mode                                           Sets the reset mode
Debug.Start                                             F5                  Starts the debug session
Debug.StepInto                                          F11                 Steps into the current subroutine
Debug.StepOut                                           Shift+F11           Steps out of the current subroutine
Debug.StepOver                                          F10                 Steps over the current subroutine
Debug.Stop                                              Shift+F5            Stops the debug session
Edit.Color                   ID, Value                                      Edits an application color
Edit.DisplayFormat           Symbol, Value                                  Edits a symbol's display format
Edit.Font                    ID, Font                                       Edits an application font
Edit.MemZone                 Symbol, Zone                                   Sets the memory zone of a symbol
Edit.Preference              ID, Value                                      Edits a user preference
Edit.RefreshRate             Symbol, Freq                                   Sets the refresh rate of a symbol
Edit.SysVar                  ID, Value                                      Edits a system variable
Elf.GetBaseAddr                                                             Returns the program's base memory address (download address)
Elf.GetEndianess                                                            Returns the data endianess of the program
Elf.GetEntryFuncPC                                                          Returns the PC register value at the program's entry function
Elf.GetEntryPointPC                                                         Returns the program's initial PC register value
Elf.GetExprValue             Expr                                           Evaluates a C-style symbol expression
Elf.GetFileClass                                                            Returns the program's ELF file class
Elf.PrintSectionInfo         Sort column                                    Prints section information to the console window
Elf.SetConfig                Flags                                          Configures the ELF parser
Exec.AddCommandOnOpen        J-Link Command                                 Schedules a J-Link command to be executed immediately before or after opening J-Link connection
Exec.Command                 J-Link Command                                 Executes a J-Link command
Exec.Connect                                                                Executes JLink's firmware connection routine
Exec.Download                File                                           Downloads a program to the target device
Exec.Reset                                                                  Executes JLink's firmware reset routine
Export.CodeProfile           File, Options, Items                           Export code profile
Export.DataGraphs            File                                           Export symbol trace
Export.Disassembly           File, Entity, Options                          Export program disassembly
Export.PowerGraphs           File                                           Export power trace
Export.Trace                 File, MaxInstCnt                               Export instruction trace
File.Close                   File                       Ctrl+F4             Closes a document
File.CloseAll                                           Ctrl+Alt+F4         Closes all open documents
File.CloseAllButThis                                    Ctrl+Shift+F4       Closes all but the active document
File.CloseAllUnedited                                                       Closes all unedited documents
File.Exit                                               Alt+F4              Closes the application
File.Load                    File, Address              Ctrl+Shift+L        Downloads a file to target memory
File.Locate                  File                                           Locates a document's file system path
File.NewProject                                         Ctrl+N              Creates a new project
File.NewProjectWizard                                   Ctrl+Alt+N          Opens the new project wizard
File.Open                    File                       Ctrl+O              Opens a document
File.OpenProjectInEditor                                Ctrl+Shift+E        Opens the project file for editing
File.OpenRecent              Index                                          Opens a recent program file
File.Reload                  File                                           Reloads a document from disk
File.Save                    File                       Ctrl+S              Saves an open document to disk
File.SaveAll                                                                Saves all modified files
File.SaveAs                  File, FileNew                                  Saves an open document under a new file path
File.SaveCopyAs              File, FileOut                                  Saves a copy of an open document
File.SaveProjectAs           File                       Ctrl+Shift+S        Saves the project file under a new file path
File.SelectInExplorer        File/Directory             Ctrl+F2             Selects a file or folder in the native file viewer
Find.Function                Function                   Ctrl+M              Navigates to a function
Find.GlobalData              Symbol                     Ctrl+J              Navigates to a global data symbol
Find.SourceFile              File                       Ctrl+K              Locates and opens a source file
Find.Text                    Text                       Ctrl+F              Searches a text in the active document
Find.TextInFiles             Text                       Ctrl+Shift+F        Searches a text in a set of documents
Find.TextInTrace             Text                       Ctrl+Shift+T        Searches a text within the instruction trace
Help.About                                                                  Shows the about dialog
Help.Commands                                           Shift+F1            Shows the command help
Help.ReleaseNotes                                                           Shows the release notes
Help.UserGuide                                          F1                  Shows the user guide
OS.AddContextSwitchSymbol    Label/Function                                 Specifies the code symbol that completes a task switch
Profile.Exclude              RegExp                                         Exclude item(s) from code profile statistic
Profile.ExportCSV            File, Fmt, Opts, Items                         Export code profile as CSV
Profile.Include              RegExp                                         Include item(s) to code profile statistic
Profile.Reset                                                               Reset code profile data
Project.AddFileAlias         Old Path, New Path                             Adds a file path alias
Project.AddPathSubstitute    Old Path, New Path                             Adds a directory path substitute
Project.AddRTTSearchRange    Address, Size                                  Adds an RTT memory search range
Project.AddRootPath          Directory Path                                 Adds a root path
Project.AddSearchPath        Directory Path                                 Adds a file search path
Project.AddSvdFile           File                                           Adds the contents of a svd file to the register window
Project.ConfigDisassembly    Flags                                          Edits disassembler options
Project.ConfigSWO            SWOFreq, CpuFreq                               Configures Serial Wire Output (SWO) settings
Project.ConfigSemihosting    Configuration String                           Configures semihosting IO
Project.DisableSessionSave   Flags                                          Disables saving of session information
Project.RelocateSymbols      Symbols, Offset                                Relocates one or multiple symbols
Project.SetBPType            Type                                           Sets the default breakpoint implementation type
Project.SetConsoleLogFile    File                                           Sets the console message log file
Project.SetCorePlugin        File                                           Sets the file path to the core plugin
Project.SetDevice            Device                                         Specifies the target device
Project.SetDisassemblyPlugin File                                           Sets the file path to the disassembly support plugin
Project.SetHostIF            HostIF, Identifier                             Specifies the host interface
Project.SetJLinkLogFile      File                                           Sets the text file that receives J-Link logging output
Project.SetJLinkScript       File                                           Sets the J-Link script to be executed on debug session start
Project.SetJTAGConfig        DRPre, IRLen                                   Specifies the target interface scan chain settings
Project.SetMemZoneRunning    Zone Name                                      Sets the default memory zone to access when the program is running
Project.SetOSPlugin          File                                           Sets the file path to the RTOS-Awareness plugin
Project.SetRTT               On/Off                                         Enables or disables RTT
Project.SetSWO               On/Off, SWOFreq, CpuFreq                       Configures Serial Wire Output (SWO) settings
Project.SetSemihosting       On/Off                                         Enables or disables semihosting IO
Project.SetTIFSpeed          Frequency                                      Specifies the target interface speed in Hz
Project.SetTargetIF          TargetIF                                       Specifies the target interface
Project.SetTerminalLogFile   File                                           Sets the terminal message log file
Project.SetTraceFile         File, ByteSize, Yes/No                         Assigns the trace file
Project.SetTracePortWidth    Width                                          Assigns the trace port width
Project.SetTraceSource       String                                         Assigns the trace source to use
Project.SetTraceTiming       D0,D1,D2,D3 [ps]                               Assigns the trace line delays
Register.Addr                Register                                       Get address of memory-mapped register
Script.DefineConst           Name, Value                                    Defines a script constant
Script.Exec                  Func, Paramlist                                Executes a script function
Show.CallGraph               Func/Address/SrcLoc        Ctrl+H              Displays the call graph of a function
Show.Data                    Symbol/Address/SrcLoc      Ctrl+T              Displays the data location of a symbol
Show.Declaration             Symbol                     Shift+F12           Displays the declaration source location of a symbol
Show.Definition              Symbol                     F12                 Displays the definition source location of a symbol
Show.Disassembly             Func/Address/SrcLoc        Ctrl+D              Displays the disassembly of a function or source statement
Show.InstTrace               Stack Position                                 Displays a previously executed instruction
Show.Line                    Line Number                                    Displays a source line
Show.Memory                  Address                                        Displays a memory location
Show.MemoryMap               Symbol/Address/SrcLoc      Ctrl+B              Displays the memory map location of a symbol
Show.NextResult                                                             Displays the next item matching the search pattern
Show.PC                                                                     Displays the PC instruction
Show.PCLine                                                                 Displays the PC source line
Show.PrevResult                                                             Displays the previous item matching the search pattern
Show.Source                  Symbol/Address/SrcLoc      Ctrl+U              Displays the source location of a function, symbol or instruction
Show.ValueData               Expression                                     Displays the symbol pointed to within the disassembly window
Show.ValueDisassembly        Expression                                     Displays the symbol pointed to within the disassembly window
Show.ValueSource             Expression                                     Displays the symbol pointed to within the source viewer
Snapshot.LoadReg             Register                                       Reads a register from the snapshot and writes it to target
Snapshot.LoadU32             Address, Size                                  Reads a value from the snapshot and writes it to target
Snapshot.ReadReg             Register                                       Reads a target register from the snapshot
Snapshot.ReadU32             Address, Size                                  Reads a target memory value from the snapshot
Snapshot.SaveReg             Register                                       Saves a target register to the snapshot
Snapshot.SaveU32             Address, Size                                  Saves a target memory value to the snapshot
Target.AddMemorySegment      Name, Addr, Size                               Adds a memory segment
Target.EraseChip                                                            Enable J-Link power supply to the target
Target.FillMemory            Addr, Size, Value                              Fills a target memory block with a given value
Target.GetReg                Register                                       Reads a target device register
Target.LoadMemory            File, Addr                                     Writes data from a binary file to the target device
Target.LoadMemoryMap         File                                           Loads a memory map file
Target.PowerOn               On/Off                                         Enable J-Link power supply to the target
Target.ReadMemory            Address, Size                                  Reads a target memory block
Target.ReadU16               Address                                        Reads a 16-bit value from target memory
Target.ReadU32               Address                                        Reads a 32-bit value from target memory
Target.ReadU64               Address                                        Reads a 64-bit value from target memory
Target.RadeU8                Address                                        Reads a 8-bit value from target memory
Target.SaveMemory            File, Addr, Size                               Writes target memory to a binary file
Target.SetAccessWidth        Value                                          Specifies the default memory access width
Target.SetEndianess          BigEndian 1/0                                  Sets the endianess of the target device
Target.SetReg                Register, Value                                Writes a target device register
Target.WriteU16              Address, Value                                 Writes a 16-bit value to target memory
Target.WriteU32              Address, Value                                 Writes a 32-bit value to target memory
Target.WriteU64              Address, Value                                 Writes a 64-bit value to target memory
Target.WriteU8               Address, Value                                 Writes a 8-bit value to target memory
Timeline.Reset                                                              Resets trace and sampling data
Toolbar.Close                Toolbar                                        Closes a toolbar
Toolbar.Show                 Toolbar                                        Shows a toolbar
Tools.JLinkSettings                                     Ctrl+Alt+J          Opens the J-Link settings dialog
Tools.Preferences                                       Ctrl+Alt+P          Opens the user preference dialog
Tools.SemihostingSettings                               Ctrl+Alt+H          Opens the semihosting settings dialog
Tools.SysVars                                           Ctrl+Alt+V          Opens the system variable editor
Tools.TraceSettings                                     Ctrl+Alt+T          Opens the trace settings dialog
Trace.ClearAllPoints                                                        Clears all tracepoints
Trace.ClearPoint             Location                                       Clears a tracepoint
Trace.DisablePoint           Location                                       Disables a tracepoint
Trace.EnablePoint            Location                                       Enables a tracepoint
Trace.Reset                                                                 Resets instruction trace data
Trace.SetPoint               Operation, Location                            Sets a tracepoint
Trace.SetSyncWithCode        On/Off                     Ctrl+Q              Sync itrace with code windows
Util.Error                   Text, StopDebug                                Shows an error message box and stops the debug session
Util.Log                     Text                                           Prints a message to the console window
Util.LogHex                  Text, IntVal                                   Prints a formated message to the console window
Util.Sleep                   Milliseconds                                   Pauses the current thread for a given amount of time
Watch.Add                    Expression                 Ctrl+W              Adds a symbol to the watched data window
Watch.Insert                 Expression, Row                                Inserts a symbol into the watched data window
Watch.Quick                  Expression                 Shift+F9            Quick watch expression
Watch.Remove                 Expression                                     Removes a symbol from the watched data window
Window.Add                   Window, Symbol                                 Adds a symbol to a window
Window.Clear                 Window                                         Clears a window
Window.Close                 Window                     Alt+X               Closes a window
Window.CloseAll                                         Alt+Shift+X         Closes all windows
Window.CollapseAll           Window                                         Collapses all items
Window.ExpandAll             Window                                         Expands all items
Window.Export                Window, File                                   Exports the contents of a window to file
Window.Insert                Window, Symbol, Row                            Inserts a symbol into a window
Window.Remove                Widnow, Symbol                                 Removed a Symbol from a window
Window.SetDisplayFormat      Window, Value                                  Sets a window's display format
Window.Show                  Window                                         Shows a window
Window.ShowFullScreen        On/Off                     Alt+Shift+Return    Enters or exits fullscreen mode
Window.WaitForUpdateComplete MaxTime                                        Waits until all debug windows have completed updating
